Mixed martial arts events
2026 in Cage Warriors
Information
First dateFebruary 21, 2026 (2026-02-21)
Events
Fights
Chronology
2025 in Cage Warriors 2026 in Cage Warriors 2027 in Cage Warriors

The year 2026 is the 26th year in the history of Cage Warriors, a mixed martial arts promotion based in England.

List of events

[edit]
# Event Date Arena Location
1 Cage Warriors 200 February 21, 2026 Simmonscourt RDS Dublin, Ireland
2 Cage Warriors 201 Mar 13, 2026 BEC Arena Manchester, England
3 Cage Warriors 202 Mar 14, 2026
4 Cage Warriors 203 Mar 20, 2026 Indigo at The O2 London, England

Cage Warriors 200

[edit]
Cage Warriors 200: Dublin
PromotionCage Warriors
DateFebruary 21, 2026 (2026-02-21)
VenueSimmonscourt RDS
CityDublin, Ireland

Cage Warriors 200: Dublin was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Cage Warriors that took place on February 21, 2026, in Dublin, Ireland.

Background

[edit]

A Cage Warriors Featherweight Championship bout between current champion Solomon Simon and Nik Bagley headlined this event.[1] They were originally scheduled to meet for the vacant title at Cage Warriors 196 in November 2025, but Bagley withdrew from the bout for unknown reasons.[2]

A Cage Warriors Middleweight Championship bout between current champion Dario Bellandi and Paddy McCorry took place at the co-main event.[3]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters received bonuses.[4]

  • Fight of the Night (£5,000): Tanio Pagliariccio vs. Ger Harris
  • Performance of the Night ($10,000): Leon Hill and Adam Darby

Results

[edit]
Main card (UFC Fight Pass)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Featherweight Nik Bagley def. Solomon Simon (c) Decision (unanimous) (50–45, 50–45, 49–46) 5 5:00 [a]
Middleweight Paddy McCorry def. Dario Bellandi (c) TKO (punches) 1 2:28 [b]
Welterweight Leon Hill def. Aldo Pereira Aguiar TKO (knee and punches) 2 3:16
Flyweight Tanio Pagliariccio def. Ger Harris Decision (split) (29–28, 28–29, 30–27) 3 5:00
Welterweight Maximus Lally def. Alexandre Junior Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 2:05
Catchweight (175 lb) Adam Darby def. Thiago Habib Submission (ninja choke) 1 1:22
Preliminary card (YouTube / UFC Fight Pass)
Featherweight Alexander O'Sullivan def. Scott Harvey TKO (punches) 1 4:37
Catchweight (163 lb) Conor McCarthy def. Edilson Souza da Silva TKO (punches) 1 3:44
Featherweight Keith Keogh def. Gabriel Ramos TKO (punch) 3 2:16
Catchweight (177 lb) Andreeas Binder def. Oton Jasse TKO (punches) 2 4:14
Featherweight Damien McKenna def. Pedro Silva KO (punch to the body) 3 4:36 [c]
Catchweight (150 lb) Lewis Byrne def. Dylan Logan TKO (elbows) 1 4:36
Lightweight Kenny Mokhonoana def. Grant Ogborne Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00 [d]
Featherweight Alex Keogh def. Taylor Sullivan Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 0:24
  1. ^ For the Cage Warriors Featherweight Championship.
  2. ^ For the Cage Warriors Middleweight Championship.
  3. ^ Silva missed weight (146.9 lb).
  4. ^ Mokhonoana missed weight (156.7 lb).

[5]

Cage Warriors 201

[edit]
Cage Warriors 201: Unplugged
PromotionCage Warriors
DateMarch 13, 2026 (2026-03-13)
VenueBEC Arena
CityManchester, England

Cage Warriors 201: Unplugged was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Cage Warriors that took place on March 13, 2026, in Manchester, England.

Background

[edit]

A featherweight bout between Aiden Lee and promotional newcomer Inglesson de Lara headlined the event.[6]

Results

[edit]
Main card (UFC Fight Pass)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Featherweight Aiden Lee def. Inglesson de Lara Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 3:36
Catchweight (161 lb) Konstantinos Ntelis def. Leon Aliu KO (punch) 1 1:08
Featherweight Matthew Elliott def. Jake McHugh KO (punches) 1 0:59
Bantamweight Damiano Scogna def. Lucas Rodrigues TKO (punches) 2 2:01
Light Heavyweight Danny Hartwell def. Branden Guest TKO (punches) 3 4:43
Flyweight Angelo Maria Terenzio def. Damien McGuigan Submission (heel hook) 1 3:39
Preliminary card (UFC Fight Pass)
Catchweight (139 lb) Armand Herczeg def. Percy Herrera TKO (knee to the body and punches) 3 1:57
Welterweight Roan Crocker def. Dara Ward Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 1:26
Catchweight (118 lb) Lindsey Payne def. Levi Steedman TKO (elbows) 2 2:57

[7]

Cage Warriors 202

[edit]
Cage Warriors 202: Manchester
PromotionCage Warriors
DateMarch 14, 2026 (2026-03-14)
VenueBEC Arena
CityManchester, England

Cage Warriors 202: Manchester was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Cage Warriors that took place on March 14, 2026, in Manchester, England.

Background

[edit]

A Cage Warriors Lightweight Championship title unification bout between current champion Samuel Silva and interim champion Omiel Brown headlined the event.[8]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters received $5,000 bonus.[9]

  • Performance of the Night: Omiel Brown

Results

[edit]
Main card (UFC Fight Pass)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Lightweight Omiel Brown (ic) def. Samuel Silva (c) TKO (punches) 3 0:56 [a]
Bantamweight Nathan Fletcher def. Thyago Silva TKO (punches) 1 1:27
Lightweight Ieuan Davies def. Michael Pagani Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Lightweight Adam Cullen def. Loibe Neto Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Lightweight Shay Ingram def. Torpal Merjoev Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00 [b]
Lightweight George Staines def. Marcelo Marques Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Preliminary card (YouTube / UFC Fight Pass)
Featherweight Alexis Tsarmantidis def. Oliver Tero Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Flyweight Connor Wilson def. Kierandip Singh Sahota Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Bantamweight Pietro Mochetti def. Sam Kelly Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Flyweight Joe Fields def. Iago Silva TKO (punches) 1 1:08
Bantamweight Jack McCloughlin def. Ramon Costa TKO (elbows) 2 2:54
Flyweight Sheldon Ryan def. Nathanael Woods Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Welterweight Chris Morris def. Mariusz Mikołajewski TKO (punches) 2 4:11
Bantamweight Alistair Fitzharris def. Ryan Hewitt Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
  1. ^ For the Cage Warriors Lightweight Championship.
  2. ^ Ingram missed weight (156.3 lb).

[10]

Cage Warriors 203

[edit]
Cage Warriors 203: London
PromotionCage Warriors
DateMarch 20, 2026 (2026-03-20)
VenueIndigo at The O2
CityLondon, England

Cage Warriors 203: London was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Cage Warriors that took place on March 20, 2026, in London, England.

Background

[edit]

A Cage Warriors Flyweight Championship bout between current champion Nicolas Leblond and Jawany Scott was scheduled to headline the event.[11] However, the bout was removed from the event due to Leblond's injury.[12]

A Cage Warriors Bantamweight Championship bout for the vacant title between Ollie Sarwa and Weslley Maia was scheduled to serve as the co-main event, but the bout was promoted to main event status after originally headliner removed.[13]

Results

[edit]
Main card (UFC Fight Pass)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Bantamweight Weslley Maia def. Ollie Sarwa Decision (unanimous) (48–47, 48–47, 48–47) 5 5:00 [a]
Lightweight Jordan Vucenic def. Daniel Konrad KO (punches) 1 1:31
Catchweight (175 lb) Manuel del Valle def. Italo Gomes TKO (punches) 2 4:44
Lightweight Stefano Catacoli def. Tariq Pell Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Middleweight Leon Naumann def. Steven Hill Submission (triangle choke) 1 1:28
Catchweight (163 lb) Marin Vetrila def. Yusuf Ali-Taleb KO (punch) 2 4:41 [b]
Preliminary card (YouTube / UFC Fight Pass)
Catchweight (150 lb) Connor Patterson def. Georgios Daskalakis Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 1:29
Lightweight Cameron Stewart def. Valentino Greco Submission (guillotine choke) 1 1:04
Lightweight Christian Soda def. Callum Haughian TKO (knees and punches) 1 1:13
Welterweight Joe Middleton def. George McManus Submission (Japanese necktie) 1 2:53 [c]
Featherweight Victor Yeo def. Harry Shaw Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
  1. ^ For the vacant Cage Warriors Bantamweight Championship.
  2. ^ Ali-Taleb missed weight (167.7 lb).
  3. ^ Middleton missed weight (172.3 lb).

[14]

Cage Warriors 204

[edit]
Cage Warriors 204: Rome
PromotionCage Warriors
DateApril 11, 2026 (2026-04-11)
VenuePalaPellicone
CityRome, Italy

Cage Warriors 204: Rome was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Cage Warriors that took place on April 11, 2026, in Rome, Italy.

Background

[edit]

A bantamweight bout between Francesco Nuzzi and Manoel Silva headlined the event.[15]

Results

[edit]
Main card (UFC Fight Pass)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Bantamweight Francesco Nuzzi vs. Manoel Silva No Contest (accidental knee to groin) 1 3:37 [a]
Heavyweight Mauro Cerilli def. Mamadou Lamine Sene Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Welterweight Khadim Dia def. Christopher Bajo Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Featherweight Luca Borando def. Caique Araujo KO (punch) 2 2:50
Lightweight Diego Visanzay def. Simone Patrizi Decision (split) (29–28, 28–29, 29–28) 3 5:00 [b]
Featherweight Giuseppe Mastrogiacomo def. Erick Washington KO (flying knee and punch) 2 4:13
Preliminary card (YouTube / UFC Fight Pass)
Welterweight Andrea Kabali def. Nicolò Solli Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Bantamweight Alexandros Moumtzis def. Dylan Hazan Submission (omoplata) 1 4:08 [c]
Lightweight Christian Soda def. Niko Ceraglia TKO (punches) 1 3:30
Catchweight (160 lb) Gianluca Rocca def. Manuel Lancioli TKO (punches) 1 0:59
Middleweight George Smith def. Mario Mingaj Submission (anaconda choke) 1 2:25
Featherweight Lorenzo De Nigris def. Francesco Tumminello Submission (rear-naked choke) 2 1:04
Bantamweight Enrico Di Gangi def. Claudio Iancu Submission (arm-triangle choke) 1 1:39
Bantamweight Tommy Brunning def. Pierluigi De Prospo Submission (rear-naked choke) 2 4:38
  1. ^ Accidental knee to the groin rendered Silva unable to continue.
  2. ^ Visanzay missed weight (156.5 lb).
  3. ^ Moumtzis missed weight (137.1 lb).

[16]

Cage Warriors 205

[edit]
Cage Warriors 205: Glasgow
PromotionCage Warriors
DateApril 25, 2026 (2026-04-25)
VenueBraehead Arena
CityGlasgow, Scotland

Cage Warriors 205: Glasgow is an upcoming mixed martial arts event promoted by Cage Warriors that will take place on April 25, 2026, in Glasgow, Scotland.

Background

[edit]

A Cage Warriors Welterweight Championship title unification bout between current champion Justin Burlinson and interim champion Sean Clancy Jr. is scheduled to headline the event.[17]

Fight card

[edit]
Main card (UFC Fight Pass)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Welterweight Justin Burlinson (c) vs. Sean Clancy Jr. (ic) [a]
Lightweight Michael Blair vs. Ermil Xhaferi
Featherweight Aidan Stephen vs. Joshua Abraham
Catchweight (140 lb) Jack Foote vs. Eoin McDonald
Lightweight Jordan Stronge vs. Marc-Philippe Ngatchou
Featherweight Damon Donald vs. Leon Armes
Preliminary card (YouTube / UFC Fight Pass)
Light Heavyweight Norbert Pietrzak vs. Michael Tchamou
Featherweight Jamie McGowan vs. Taylor Sullivan
Welterweight Lewis Urquhart vs. Senan Coakley
Catchweight (132 lb) Igor Wojtas vs. Leonardo de Oliveira
Flyweight Gary Priestly vs. Aaron Towns
Middleweight Graham Sheehan vs. Geoff Pavey
  1. ^ For the Cage Warriors Welterweight Championship.

[18]
